purpose: Cross-platform session handoff. Updated by both Claude Code and Codex at the end of any session that makes significant changes. Read at the start of every session before doing meaningful work.

protocol.on_session_start: Read this file. Check last_platform, last_updated, and pending_for_next_session. Look for tool_changes that affect your environment (e.g. new brew installs). Check recent_commits for context on what changed.
protocol.on_session_end: Update this file: set last_platform, last_updated, increment recent_commits, update tool_versions if anything changed, move resolved items out of pending_for_next_session, add new pending items.
protocol.conflict_rule: If both platforms made commits since last_updated, merge the recent_commits lists by date. Do not overwrite — append.
